name: Vegetable Burgers (Welch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bulgur wheat in hot water for 10 minutes or until tender, then drain.
2. Heat oil in a skillet and sauté mushrooms, carrots, onions, and garlic for 15 minutes. Let cook.
3. Grind walnuts and sunflower seeds. In a bowl, add sesame seeds, bulgur, and wheat germ.
4. Mix the sautéed vegetables with parsley, dill, tahini, chickpeas, tamari, lemon juice, cayenne pepper, salt, freshly ground pepper, and ground cumin until blended (small lumps are acceptable).
5. Chill the mixture thoroughly to firm it up.
6. Shape into patties and lightly oil them. Cook for 4 minutes on each side, flipping carefully with a wide spatula to prevent falling apart.
7. Serve on toasted rolls with slices of tomato, sprouts, cucumber, and yogurt.
Serves 8-10, depending on the size of the patties/rolls.
Enjoy with a nice medium-diced marinated fresh vegetable salad or coleslaw or carrot slaw.
